mapper.select: select fu.id ,fu.name ,fu.parent_id ,fu.obj_name ,fu.icon_name ,fu.sort from user_role usr left join role_function fun on usr.role_id=fun.role_id left join function fu on fun.function_id=fu.id where usr.user_id=#{id}
select id ,user_code ,user_name ,pass_word ,business_type ,mobile ,address ,identification ,business_licens ,identification_positive ,identification_obverse from user where user_code = #{adminId}

select id ,user_code ,user_name ,pass_word ,business_type ,mobile ,address ,identification ,business_licens ,identification_positive ,identification_obverse ,is_valid from user where user_name = #{userName}

select id ,user_code ,user_name ,pass_word ,business_type ,mobile ,address ,identification ,business_licens ,identification_positive ,identification_obverse ,is_valid from user where identification = #{identification}

select id ,user_code ,user_name ,pass_word ,business_type ,mobile ,address ,identification ,business_licens ,identification_positive ,identification_obverse ,is_valid from user where mobile = #{mobile}
